# Tests currently expected to pass under tests/stub on mri.
# CI fails if any of these stops passing (regression).
# Add lines as we fix more; remove with reason in commit msg.
# Sorted alphabetically. Refresh with bin/refresh-testkit-baseline stub (running on mri).
# Tests known to fail in CI for env reasons live in
# .github/testkit-stub-baseline-exclude-mri.txt and are skipped here.
